chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-552 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.9222/2024. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.9223/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2024 Mr. Saad Salman Ghani, Advocate for applicant. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Heard learned counsel for applicant and perused the impugned order dated 23.07.2024 which reveals that bail was granted to the respondent No.1 on the ground that delay has not been explained by the complainant in registration of FIR. It further reveals that offence for which the respondent No.1 / accused allegedly involved does not fall within the prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr.P.C and in such cases grant of bail is rule and refusal is an exception. No infirmity or illegality is found in the impugned order and the same does not require interference of this Court therefore instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application being devoid of merits is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
